creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Kurt,

thanks for submitting this update but I do not manage to get the
new version to compile. See for example those logs:

https://redports.org/~culot/20120806063458-19166-44939/cego-2.13.7.log
https://redports.org/~culot/20120806063458-19166-44940/cego-2.13.7.log

Could you please have a look at the above?

Thanks,
Frederic
